---
title: 快速开始
navigation:
  icon: i-lucide-file-text
---
## 测试服务

- 地址：`http://192.168.233.107:9001`
- 账号：`ct-rustfs-admin`
- 密码：`ct-rustfs-admin-pwd`

![图片](data:image/png;base64,)
## 原生集成

### 安装依赖

```plain
<dependency>
    <groupId>com.ctdi.sdk</groupId>
    <artifactId>rustfs-sdk</artifactId>
    <version>0.0.1-SNAPSHOT</version>
</dependency>
```
### 添加配置

```yaml
# application.properties
rustfs.endpoint=http://192.168.233.107:9000
rustfs.client-id=jiKqXta3GSyAVJn9wQ4x
rustfs.client-secret=p0tI7oSUECd49ski5gh12cOrxvFuNRPTJfYnHVem
rustfs.bucket=mybucket
```
### 初始化客户端

```java
package com.example.demo;

import com.ctdi.demo.rust.fs.sdk.client.RustFSClient;
import com.ctdi.demo.rust.fs.sdk.config.RustFSConfig;
import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Value;
import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;
import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;

@Configuration
public class RustFSClientConfig {
    @Value("${rustfs.endpoint}")
    private String endpoint;
    @Value("${rustfs.client-id}")
    private String clientId;
    @Value("${rustfs.client-secret}")
    private String clientSecret;
    @Value("${rustfs.bucket}")
    private String bucket;

    @Bean
    public RustFSClient rustFSClient() {
        RustFSConfig config = RustFSConfig.builder()
                .endpoint(endpoint)
                .clientId(clientId)
                .clientSecret(clientSecret)
                .bucket(bucket)
                .build();
        return new RustFSClient(config);
    }
}
```
### 使用客户端

```java
package com.example.demo;

import com.ctdi.demo.keycloak.sdk.client.KeycloakClient;
import com.ctdi.demo.rust.fs.sdk.client.RustFSClient;
import jakarta.annotation.Resource;
import org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication;
import org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.SpringBootApplication;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;

@SpringBootApplication
@RestController
public class DemoApplication {

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        SpringApplication.run(DemoApplication.class, args);
    }

    @Resource
    private RustFSClient rustFSClient;

    @GetMapping("/hello")
    public String hello() {
        return "Hello from Spring Boot!";
    }

    @GetMapping("/api/file/url")
    public String fileUrl() {
        return this.rustFSClient.getPreviewUrl("10-1.jpeg");
    }
}
```
### 其他参考

参考：`com.ctdi.sdk.rustfs.example.RustFSExample`

```java
package com.ctdi.sdk.rustfs.example;

import com.ctdi.demo.rust.fs.sdk.client.RustFSClient;
import com.ctdi.demo.rust.fs.sdk.config.RustFSConfig;

import java.nio.file.Paths;

public class RustFSExample {

    private static final String ENDPOINT = "http://192.168.233.107:9000";
    private static final String CLIENT_ID = "jiKqXta3GSyAVJn9wQ4x";
    private static final String CLIENT_SECRET = "p0tI7oSUECd49ski5gh12cOrxvFuNRPTJfYnHVem";
    private static final String BUCKET = "mybucket";

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        RustFSConfig config = RustFSConfig.builder()
                .endpoint(ENDPOINT)
                .clientId(CLIENT_ID)
                .clientSecret(CLIENT_SECRET)
                .bucket(BUCKET)
                .build();

        RustFSClient client = new RustFSClient(config);

        System.out.println(client.deleteFile("10-1.jpeg"));
        System.out.println(client.uploadFile("10-1.jpeg", Paths.get("/Users/ibingbo/Downloads/10-1.jpeg")));
        System.out.println(client.existFile("10-1.jpeg"));
        System.out.println(client.getPreviewUrl("10-1.jpeg"));

        System.out.println(client.deleteFile("test.jpg"));
        System.out.println(client.copyFile("10-1.jpeg", "test.jpg"));

        System.out.println(client.existFile("test.jpg"));
        System.out.println(client.getPreviewUrl("test.jpg"));
        System.out.println(client.deleteFile("test.jpg"));
        System.out.println(client.existFile("test.jpg"));
        System.out.println(client.deleteFile("10-1.jpeg"));

    }
}
```
## Spring Boot集成

### 在业务项目中引入依赖

```plain
<dependency>
    <groupId>com.ctdi.sdk</groupId>
    <artifactId>rustfs-spring-boot-starter</artifactId>
    <version>1.0.0</version>
</dependency>
<dependency>
    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter</artifactId>
</dependency>
<dependency>
    <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
    <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
</dependency>
```
### 配置 application.yml

```yaml
rustfs:
  endpoint: http://127.0.0.1:9000
  client-id: rustfsadmin
  client-secret: rustfsadmin
  region: us-east-1
  bucket: mybucket
  path-style-access: true
```
### 在业务代码中使用

```java
package com.ctdi.sdk.demo;

import com.ibingbo.sdk.rustfs.client.RustFSClient;
import jakarta.annotation.Resource;
import org.springframework.boot.SpringApplication;
import org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.SpringBootApplication;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;

import java.io.IOException;

@SpringBootApplication
@RestController
public class DemoApplication {

    @Resource
    private RustFSClient rustFSClient;

    public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException, InterruptedException {
        SpringApplication.run(DemoApplication.class, args);
    }

    @GetMapping("/file/url")
    public Object fileUrl() {
        return this.rustFSClient.getPreviewUrl("11-11.jpeg");
    }
}
```
